calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1452-1454 48th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

The sale was confirmed at $1,150,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed August 20, 2018. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
